title: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool fits your business.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Both ActiveCampaign and Constant Contact are established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign focuses on advanced automation and CRM capabilities, while Constant Contact emphasizes simplicity and accessibility for small businesses and nonprofits. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your marketing strategy.
choose_a_if: You need sophisticated automation workflows and lead scoring capabilities
CRM integration and site tracking are essential for your business
You want higher customer satisfaction ratings and advanced features
choose_b_if: You're looking for the lowest entry price point
You need built-in e-commerce and social media advertising tools
You prefer a simpler, more beginner-friendly interface

faq.q: Is ActiveCampaign better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign excels in automation, CRM, and advanced features with higher customer ratings, making it better for growing businesses needing sophisticated tools. Constant Contact is simpler and cheaper, making it ideal for small businesses and nonprofits just starting out with email marketing.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact has a lower starting price at $12/month compared to ActiveCampaign's $15/month. However, ActiveCampaign's advanced features may provide better value for businesses that need automation and CRM capabilities, justifying the slightly higher cost.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible and both platforms support data migration. Most email marketing platforms allow you to export your contact lists and campaign data, though you may need to recreate automation workflows and templates in ActiveCampaign. Check each platform's migration guides for detailed instructions.
